sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Number of Contracts = Total Stake / (Total Stake / Biggest Loss). The divisor is derived from historical largest loss; no specific f value given in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by dividing total stake by the quotient of total stake divided by the biggest loss (optimal f divisor), with the result indicating how many contracts or bets to have on.
